Apply when editing documentation.

Canonical references:
- `GENIA_STATE.md`
- `GENIA_RULES.md`
- `AGENTS.md`
- `docs/ai/LLM_CONTRACT.md`

Use the precedence and semantic rules from those files.
Do not redefine language semantics here.

## Rules
- Docs must reflect actual behavior
- Do not document speculative features
- Keep examples simple and accurate
- Update docs and tests together when behavior changes

## Code Blocks
- Use runnable examples where possible
- Clearly distinguish:
  - runnable examples
  - illustrative examples

## Consistency
- If syntax changes, update ALL examples
- Keep terminology consistent with GENIA_RULES.md

## Style
- Prefer clarity over completeness
- Avoid unnecessary verbosity
